CustomMetadata.label: LA-003 - Aura component suppresses errors via $A.reportError

values.value: One or more Aura component bundles call $A.reportError. This pattern can suppress Aura errors silently, preventing security-related exceptions from surfacing. This is a heuristic check - manual code review required to confirm.
Security-related exceptions such as permission denied or sharing violations may be silently hidden from administrators. This can mask active exploit attempts.

Replace $A.reportError usage with explicit error handling that surfaces failures to the user and logs them via an Apex method. Errors should never be silently swallowed in security-sensitive code paths.
